title: Disable Glowing Effect
description:
Disable Glowing - Disables the glowing effect

Disabling the glow effect
body:
**Disable the Glow**

Resource pack to disable the glow effect

Here's what the glowing entities will look like
![That's what the glow-in-the-dark vanities will look like.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7972ba579e787bc9b0a8cc9610424faf4698b97.png)
